modules.name: n8n as Connector Layer
modules.bridgeContent: Show HTTP Request nodes and webhooks connecting n8n to Claude, ChatGPT, and Allternit APIs. n8n as integration layer.

modules.name: Self-Hosting & Scaling
modules.bridgeContent: Docker deployment, env vars, unlimited executions. Exposing n8n workflows as MCP tools.

modules.name: Bridge: How Allternit Uses n8n
modules.bridgeContent: How workflow-engine delegates orchestration to n8n while retaining state in its own runtime.

modules.name: Capstone: Build a Self-Hosted n8n MCP Workflow
modules.bridgeContent: Project brief: Slack → LLM classification → Route to Notion or Allternit webhook. Exposed as MCP tool.
